name: /doctor coverage check distinguishes a fully-supported language file from a partially-supported one
command: mkdir -p repo && printf 'const x=1\n' > repo/x.js && printf 'package main\n' > repo/main.go && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check coverage --root repo --emit table 2>out.txt && grep -q 'js: full' out.txt && grep -q 'go: partial' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
